title: Decoding Research Trends: A Clustering Based Topic Modeling Framework
desc: Proposed a clustering-based topic modeling framework for decoding research trends accepted with minor revision for IEEE Xplore and Scopus indexing by developing novel clustering algorithms applied to academic publication data.

title: Beyond NER: A Comparative Benchmark of Medical BERTS for Multi-Label Adverse Drug Reaction Classification
conference: International Conference on Intelligent Data Analysis and Applications (IDAA 2025)
desc: Benchmarked domain-specific Medical BERT models for multi-label adverse drug reaction classification demonstrating improved performance over general BERT on the PsyTAR dataset by fine-tuning BioBERT and PubMedBERT architectures with multi-label classification heads.

title: Unfolding Emerging Issues in the Context of Changing Climatic Scenario
desc: Presented statistical analysis of emerging climate issues to an international audience contributing to South Asian regional understanding of environmental trends by collecting, modeling, and visualizing climate data with statistical methods.
